action.reasoning: Observation: 8-epoch run with stronger aug improved test bacc to 0.6344 (val 0.8499). Per-class on test: squirrel (0.28), bobcat (0.32), bird (0.44), rabbit (0.59) struggle. Some classes great (raccoon 0.92, coyote 0.92, dog 0.86). Analysis: Big val/test gap = domain shift to L100. Strategy ideas: (1) train on train+val combined for more data, (2) use larger image resolution (DINOv2 supports 518), (3) add CutMix/Mixup, (4) use logit adjustment for class imbalance instead of weighted loss to avoid bias toward minority classes during prediction. Since test is heavily imbalanced (raccoon 52%), strong reweighting may hurt majority class recall. The squirrel/bobcat/bird recalls are very low - those have very few training samples likely. Let me try: (a) increase image size to 280 or use 14 patch native, (b) train longer with stronger reg, (c) use 224 with more epochs combined train+val. Decision: Train 12 epochs with combined train+val, lower LR backbone, slightly milder class weights. Also use TTA with multi-crop in predict.
